    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W X Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    act() - Method in class AirHockeyGame
    runs one frame of the game pre: setup() is done and all game objects exist post: movement, goals, and collisions are checked, or the game ends if time/score is up
    act() - Method in class framework.Game
    When the game begins, this method will automatically be executed every millisecond This may be used as a control method for checking user input and collision between any game objects
    act() - Method in class framework.GameObject
    This method should be implemented to provide a behavior for this object.
    act() - Method in class Paddle
    leaves paddle frame behavior to AirHockeyGame pre: none post: nothing - paddle movement is controlled through move() in AirHockeyGame
    act() - Method in class PauseButton
    leaves the pause button still each frame pre: none post: nothing - the button has no per-frame behavior
    act() - Method in class Powerup
    leaves powerup lifecycle behavior to AirHockeyGame pre: none post: nothing - powerup has no per-frame behavior; lifecycle is managed by AirHockeyGame
    act() - Method in class Puck
    leaves puck frame behavior to AirHockeyGame pre: none post: nothing - movement is handled in AirHockeyGame, not here
    act() - Method in class Rink
    the rink does not need to do anything each frame pre: none post: no state changes
    add(GameObject) - Method in class framework.Game
    Adds a game object to the screen Any added objects will have their act method called every millisecond
    AirHockeyApp - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    AirHockeyApp() - Constructor for class AirHockeyApp
     
    AirHockeyGame - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    AirHockeyGame() - Constructor for class AirHockeyGame
     
    AKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     

    B

    BattleSoundPlayer - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    BattleSoundPlayer() - Constructor for class BattleSoundPlayer
     
    bounceHorizontal() - Method in class Puck
    bounces the puck left or right pre: puck exists post: xSpeed is flipped (puck reverses left/right direction)
    bounceVertical() - Method in class Puck
    bounces the puck up or down pre: puck exists post: ySpeed is flipped (puck reverses up/down direction)

    C

    CandyBattle - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    CandyBattle() - Constructor for class CandyBattle
     
    checkExpiry(long) - Method in class Powerup
    expires old powerups pre: nowMillis is the current wall-clock time from System.currentTimeMillis() post: if FIELD_LIVE_MS has passed since spawn and the powerup was not collected, active is set to false; otherwise no change
    collect() - Method in class Powerup
    marks the powerup as collected pre: powerup is active and on the field post: collected and active are both set so the icon is removed from play
    collides(GameObject) - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Returns true if this object collides with another GameObject
    CursorControlledPaddle - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    CursorControlledPaddle(int, int, Color) - Constructor for class CursorControlledPaddle
    creates a paddle that can follow the cursor pre: centerX and centerY are valid positions on screen, color is not null post: cursor controlled paddle is created like a normal paddle

    D

    DKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    DownKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     

    E

    EFFECT_MS - Static variable in class Powerup
     

    F

    fadeOut() - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    fades out the current music pre: none post: music fades out over ~1 second by restarting afplay at the current position with decreasing volume; playback stops when volume reaches zero
    FIELD_LIVE_MS - Static variable in class Powerup
     
    findBattleMusicFile() - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    finds the battle music file pre: none post: returns the requested battle-stage music file, or null if missing
    findThemeFile() - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    finds the normal menu theme file pre: none post: returns the theme.mp3 file located next to the bin directory, or null if the location cannot be resolved
    followCursor(int, int, int, int, int, int) - Method in class CursorControlledPaddle
    moves the paddle center to the cursor position pre: minX, maxX, minY, maxY define the allowed rink area post: paddle center follows the cursor but stays inside the allowed area
    framework - package framework
     

    G

    Game - Class in framework
    An abstract Game class which can be built into Pong.

    The default controls are for "Player 1" to move left and right with the 'Z' and 'X' keys, and "Playr 2" to move left and right with the 'N' and 'M' keys.

    Before the Game begins, the setup method is executed.
    Game() - Constructor for class framework.Game
    The default constructor for the game.
    GameObject - Class in framework
    An abstract class for an object which can be added to an instance of Game

    The act method can be implemented to provide a behavior for the object, and will be called every millisecond automatically by a Game it has been added to.
    GameObject() - Constructor for class framework.GameObject
     
    getCenterX() - Method in class Powerup
    gets the powerup center x position pre: powerup exists post: returns the horizontal center of the powerup icon on screen
    getCenterX() - Method in class Puck
    gets the puck center x position pre: puck exists on screen post: returns the x coordinate of the center of the puck
    getCenterY() - Method in class Powerup
    gets the powerup center y position pre: powerup exists post: returns the vertical center of the powerup icon on screen
    getCenterY() - Method in class Puck
    gets the puck center y position pre: puck exists on screen post: returns the y coordinate of the center of the puck
    getFieldHeight() - Method in class framework.Game
    Gets the pixel height of the visible playing field
    getFieldWidth() - Method in class framework.Game
    Gets the pixel width of the visible playing field
    getFormattedTimeRemaining() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    getLastError() - Static method in class CandyBattle
    gets the most recent camera or script error pre: none post: returns the last camera/script error, or an empty string if there was none
    getOwnerPlayer() - Method in class Powerup
    gets the player who benefits from this powerup pre: powerup exists post: returns 1 if this powerup benefits player 1, 2 if it benefits player 2
    getRadius() - Method in class Puck
    gets the puck radius pre: puck exists post: returns the radius of the puck in pixels
    getTimeRemainingSeconds() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    getType() - Method in class Powerup
    gets the powerup effect type pre: powerup exists post: returns the type constant (TYPE_SIZE, TYPE_SPEED, or TYPE_SLOW)
    getX() - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Gets the x component of the coordinate of the upper left corner of this object The coordinate is relative to the playing field, with 0 being the far left of the field, and positive values moving toward the right of the field
    getY() - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Gets the y component of the coordinate of the upper left corner of this object The coordinate is relative to the playing field, with 0 being the top of the field, and positive values moving toward the bottom of the field
    grow() - Method in class Paddle
    makes the paddle taller pre: paddle is on screen post: paddle height grows to 1.5x; vertical center is preserved

    H

    hitByPaddle(Paddle) - Method in class Puck
    bounces the puck off a paddle pre: puck is overlapping the given paddle post: xSpeed is flipped, puck is pushed outside the paddle so it doesn't get stuck
    HomeScreen - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    HomeScreen() - Constructor for class HomeScreen
    builds the main menu window pre: none post: the home screen window is fully built and ready to be shown; buttons are wired to their actions

    I

    initComponents() - Method in class framework.Game
    Sets up the game and any objects.
    isActive() - Method in class Powerup
    checks whether the powerup is still active pre: powerup exists post: returns true if the icon is still on the field and has not been collected
    isCollected() - Method in class Powerup
    checks whether the powerup has been collected pre: powerup exists post: returns true if the puck has already picked up this powerup
    isTimeUp() - Method in class framework.Game
     

    L

    launchGame() - Static method in class AirHockeyApp
    creates and starts a new air hockey match pre: none post: a new AirHockeyGame window is created, shown, and started
    LeftKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    lowerVolume() - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    lowers the current music volume pre: none post: a new quiet afplay process starts at volume 0.2; after 300ms the old loud process is killed so the transition has no audible gap

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class AirHockeyApp
    starts the app at the home screen pre: none post: the home screen is shown; the game launches when Play is pressed
    MKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
    Returns true if the 'M' key is being pressed down
    move(boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, int, int, int, int) - Method in class Paddle
    moves the paddle from keyboard input pre: minX, maxX, minY, maxY define the area the paddle is allowed to move in post: paddle moves in the direction of any held keys, and stays within the given bounds
    MusicPlayer - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    MusicPlayer() - Constructor for class MusicPlayer
     

    N

    NKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
    Returns true if the 'N' key is being pressed down

    P

    p1Wins() - Method in class framework.Game
    Displays a dialog that says "Player 1 Wins!"
    p2Wins() - Method in class framework.Game
    Displays a dialog that says "Player 2 Wins!"
    Paddle - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Paddle(int, int, Color) - Constructor for class Paddle
    creates a paddle at a center point pre: centerX and centerY are valid positions on screen, color is not null post: paddle is created, sized, and placed so its center is at (centerX, centerY)
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Paints the object on the screen.
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class Paddle
    draws the paddle pre: g is a valid Graphics object post: paddle is drawn with a white border and the player's color inside
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class PauseButton
    draws the pause button pre: g is a valid Graphics object post: button is drawn as a rounded rectangle with centered PAUSE text; background lightens when the mouse hovers over it
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class Powerup
    draws the powerup icon pre: g is a valid Graphics object post: the powerup icon is drawn in the component's local coordinate space: gold "1.5x" for size, cyan arrows for speed, orange arrows for slow opponent
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class Puck
    draws the puck pre: g is a valid Graphics object post: puck is drawn as a white circle with a dark grey fill inside
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class Rink
    draws the rink, goals, labels, and scoreboard pre: the rink dimensions and scoreboard values are set post: the current rink is drawn on screen
    PauseButton - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    PauseButton(int, int, Runnable) - Constructor for class PauseButton
    creates the pause button and click handler pre: onClick is not null post: button is sized, positioned, and wired to call onClick when clicked
    pauseGame() - Method in class framework.Game
    Pauses the game loop and freezes the countdown timer.
    Powerup - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Powerup(int, int, int, int, long) - Constructor for class Powerup
    creates a powerup token pre: cx and cy are valid center coordinates inside the rink, owner is 1 or 2, powerupType is TYPE_SIZE/TYPE_SPEED/TYPE_SLOW, spawnMillis is System.currentTimeMillis() post: a new active, uncollected powerup is sized and positioned so its center is at (cx, cy), ready to be added to the game
    Puck - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Puck(int, int) - Constructor for class Puck
    creates a puck at a center point pre: centerX and centerY are valid positions inside the rink post: puck is created and placed so its center is at (centerX, centerY)

    R

    RADIUS - Static variable in class Powerup
     
    remove(GameObject) - Method in class framework.Game
    Removes a game object from the screen
    reset(int, int, int) - Method in class Puck
    resets the puck after a goal pre: direction is either 1 or -1 post: puck is moved to (centerX, centerY) and speed is reset toward the given direction
    resetGameTimer() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    RESPAWN_MS - Static variable in class Powerup
     
    resumeGame() - Method in class framework.Game
    Resumes the game loop; shifts the countdown forward by the time spent paused so no match time is lost.
    revert() - Method in class Paddle
    returns the paddle to normal height pre: paddle has been grown via grow() post: paddle height returns to PADDLE_HEIGHT; vertical center is preserved
    revertSpeed() - Method in class Paddle
    returns the paddle speed to normal pre: speedUp() or slowDown() was called post: currentSpeed is restored to the default SPEED
    RightKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    Rink - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Rink(int, int, int, int, int, int, int, String, String) - Constructor for class Rink
    creates the rink background and saves the player labels pre: dimensions are positive and player names are not null post: the rink covers the window and is ready to draw
    run() - Static method in class CandyBattle
    runs the python candy battle and reads the winner pre: the python env, script, model, and a working USB camera are available post: returns 1 if Player 1 won, 2 if Player 2 won, or 0 if there is no winner or anything went wrong (so the match never gets stuck)

    S

    setBackground(Color) - Method in class framework.Game
    Sets the background color of the playing field The default color is black
    setColor(Color) - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Sets the color of this object
    setDelay(int) - Method in class framework.Game
    Sets the millisecond delay between calls to act methods.
    setMatchLengthSeconds(int) - Method in class framework.Game
     
    setScoreboard(int, int, String) - Method in class Rink
    updates the score and timer shown at the top of the rink pre: the game gives the current scores and timer text post: the new scoreboard values are saved and the rink repaints
    setSize(int, int) - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Sets the pixel width and height of the object
    setup() - Method in class AirHockeyGame
    sets up the window, timer, player names, and starting objects pre: the game frame exists but nothing has been added yet post: the rink, puck, paddles, and 0-0 scoreboard are ready
    setup() - Method in class framework.Game
    When implemented, this will allow the programmer to initialize the game before it begins running Adding objects to the game and setting their initial positions should be done here.
    setX(int) - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Sets the x (horizontal) position of this object Setting the x position will not affect the y position
    setY(int) - Method in class framework.GameObject
    Sets the y (vertical) position of this object Setting the y position will not affect the x position
    showHome() - Static method in class AirHockeyApp
    opens the home screen with menu music pre: none post: a new HomeScreen is created, music plays, and the window is shown
    showHomeQuiet() - Static method in class AirHockeyApp
    opens the home screen without starting music pre: none post: a new HomeScreen is created without music (used when quitting mid-game)
    SKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     
    slowDown() - Method in class Paddle
    makes the paddle move slower pre: paddle exists post: currentSpeed is set to 0.75x normal; paddle moves slower until revertSpeed()
    speedUp() - Method in class Paddle
    makes the paddle move faster pre: paddle exists post: currentSpeed is set to 1.5x normal; paddle moves faster until revertSpeed()
    start(File) - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    starts one music file once pre: none post: music starts playing from the given file; any previous playback is stopped
    startGame() - Method in class framework.Game
    Starts updates to the game The game should automatically start.
    startLoop() - Static method in class BattleSoundPlayer
    starts the item-box sound during the camera battle pre: item-box sound file exists post: item-box sound loops until stop() is called
    startLoop(File) - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    starts one music file on repeat pre: none post: music loops from the given file until stop() or another track starts
    stop() - Static method in class BattleSoundPlayer
    stops the item-box battle sound pre: none post: battle sound stops immediately
    stop() - Static method in class MusicPlayer
    stops the current music pre: none post: music stops immediately
    stopGame() - Method in class framework.Game
    Stops updates to the game This can act like a "pause" method

    T

    TYPE_SIZE - Static variable in class Powerup
     
    TYPE_SLOW - Static variable in class Powerup
     
    TYPE_SPEED - Static variable in class Powerup
     

    U

    update() - Method in class Puck
    moves the puck by its current speed pre: puck exists post: puck's position is updated by adding xSpeed and ySpeed
    UpKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     

    W

    WKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
     

    X

    XKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
    Returns true if the 'X' key is being pressed down

    Z

    ZKeyPressed() - Method in class framework.Game
    Returns true if the 'Z' key is being pressed down
    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W X Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form
